Title: Advanced Permissions for Umbraco
Description: Fine-grained user group permission management for content, document types and the Library: explicit Allow/Deny entries with per-entry scope, tree inheritance, an All Users Group baseline, per-group control over which document and element types may be created, and full audit reasoning for every effective permission.

AuthorDetails.Name: Luuk Peters
AuthorDetails.Description: Umbraco developer building packages that extend the CMS with enterprise-grade features. Creator of Advanced Permissions for Umbraco.

Screenshots.Caption: Manage Allow/Deny permissions per user group across your content tree — each permission inherited or overridden independently.
Set Allow or Deny for a single permission, with scope (this node, its descendants, or both) — without restating the rest.
New in v18: the same control across Umbraco's Library — manage what each group may do to library folders and items.
Decide which document types each user group may create, and where.
Audit the effective permissions any user or group has at any node.
Every result is fully explained: which group contributed, from which node, and whether it was explicit or inherited.
